scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/testRunner.ts src/fileManager.ts src/snapshots.ts --format esm --clean
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/agentPlanner.test.ts src/fileManager.test.ts src/snapshots.test.ts src/testRunner.test.ts src/taskLifecycle.test.ts src/workspaceMaterializer.test.ts
